skills.label: Dazzle
skills.description: Flash the coin. 25% chance to blind — enemy misses next attack.

textByRace.goblin: The coin catches everything. You are the most dangerous thing in this forest and you look incredible.
textByRace.human: The false coin catches light like a real one. Enemies will see it before they see you.
textByRace.elf: Beauty from deception. You are troubled by how much you like it.
